title: 无标题文章
summary: What's interesting about the implementation is that I used as small MLP to approximate/compress what would otherwise be a large LUT (both on disk and in RAM). This is what makes the library usable in an Android application at virtually no cost. The inference runs in 3.1µs on the CPU on a Pixel 6. Gradients are rendered directly on the GPU.
content: What's interesting about the implementation is that I used as small MLP to approximate/compress what would otherwise be a large LUT (both on disk and in RAM). This is what makes the library usable in an Android application at virtually no cost. The inference runs in 3.1µs on the CPU on a Pixel 6. Gradients are rendered directly on the GPU.
